title: Combining Security Associations (SA Bundle) for IPsec
description: This flowchart illustrates the process and logic for combining multiple Security Associations (SAs) to create a secure communication channel, detailing the different bundle types and their application.
relationships: SPD defines policy requiring multiple SAs
SAD is queried for existing SAs matching policy
If no SAs exist, IKE negotiates new SAs
SAs are combined into a bundle as per policy
Outbound packet is processed sequentially by each SA in the bundle
Inbound packet is processed in reverse order by the bundle
